description_long: This is a large, plush armchair upholstered in a dark, glossy leather-like material. The seat, backrest, and armrests are all generously padded, giving the chair a soft and inviting appearance. The armrests are wide and rounded, seamlessly integrated into the overall form of the chair. The backrest is tall and slightly curved, providing ample support for the upper back and head. There are no visible legs, as the base of the chair extends directly to the floor, suggesting a solid and stable construction. The surface of the upholstery is smooth with subtle creases and reflections, indicating a supple, high-quality finish.
description: A large, dark, glossy leather armchair with wide padded armrests and a tall, cushioned backrest. The chair has a smooth, plush appearance and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, padded armrests, deep seat, and tall, cushioned backrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick armrest and the continuous, plush seat and backrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, slightly curved backrest and the solid, seamless base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the rounded armrest and a visible lever, likely for reclining functionality.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, padded, and fully upholstered in glossy leather
attribute_backrest_style: tall, slightly curved, and deeply cushioned with a smooth surface
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs; base extends directly to the floor
